buttons.name: 下载

columns.name: fileId
columns.uploadApi: (param, uploadProgressEvent) => {const paramsData = new FormData(); paramsData.append('file', param.file); paramsData.append('uid', param.file.uid); paramsData.append('description', ''); const uploadFile = window.Tech.metaApi.metaUpload(paramsData, window.tech.apiHost, uploadProgressEvent); return uploadFile;}
columns.bind_on_handleSuccess: (vm) => {const {file, fileList, fileUidMap} = vm.value; vm.self.$ds.form.fileName = vm.value.response.result.data[0].name; vm.self.$ds.form.fileLocation = vm.value.response.result.data[0].key; console.log(vm.value, vm.self, vm.value.response.result.data[0].key, vm.self.$ds.form.fileLocation);}
